category_sources: Official Transifex developer docs document the CLI for syncing localization files with Transifex.
source_facts.description says it is the Transifex command-line client.
display_name_sources: Official Transifex docs page names the tool “Transifex Client” and documents the CLI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to developers.transifex.com/docs/cli for installation.
Official Transifex developer documentation has a dedicated CLI page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/transifex/cli; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs describe tx push/pull, localization resources, and note the new client is written in Go.
source_facts.description identifies the Transifex command-line client.
